message:
style(vc_collect): reformat async fn collect signatures across all collectors

- Break long `async fn collect(&self, _cx: &asupersync::Cx, ctx: &CollectContext) -> Result<CollectResult, CollectError>` signatures across multiple lines for readability
- Applied consistently to all 15 collector modules (afsc, beads, caam, cass, caut, cloud_bench, dcg, github, mcp_mail, ntm, pt, rano, rch, sysmoni) plus mod.rs test collectors (DummyCollector, IncrementalDummyCollector, FailingDummyCollector, ToolRequiringDummyCollector, BatchDummyCollector, RuCollector, FallbackProbeCollector)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
